tasks.label: Stop LifePath server (python)
args: set -euo pipefail; if [ -f server.pid ]; then pid=$(cat server.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Stopping server PID $pid"; kill "$pid" || true; for i in {1..30}; do kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || break; sleep 0.1; done; if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "PID $pid still alive; force killing"; kill -9 "$pid" || true; fi; fi; rm -f server.pid; else echo "No server.pid found"; fi; pids=$(lsof -nP -t -iTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "${pids:-}" ]; then for p in $pids; do cmd=$(ps -p "$p" -o command= 2>/dev/null || true); echo "Stopping port 5173 listener PID $p ($cmd)"; kill "$p" || true; for i in {1..20}; do kill -0 "$p" 2>/dev/null || break; sleep 0.1; done; if kill -0 "$p" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Listener $p still alive; force killing"; kill -9 "$p" || true; fi; done; fi

tasks.label: Run LifePath server (python)
args: set -euo pipefail; if [ -f server.pid ]; then pid=$(cat server.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Server already running (PID $pid)"; exit 0; fi; fi; rm -f server.pid; env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python3 -u server.py --daemon --log-file server.log --supervise --restart-delay 1.0 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173; for i in {1..30}; do [ -s server.pid ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; if [ -s server.pid ]; then echo "Started server PID $(cat server.pid) (log: server.log)"; else echo "Failed to start server (no server.pid written). Check server.log"; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: Extract LifePath project to serverbk
args: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p ../serverbk; rsync -a --exclude '.venv' --exclude '.DS_Store' --exclude 'server.pid' --exclude 'serverbk' ./ ../serverbk/; echo 'Done: copied to ../serverbk'
